languages.text: "Йоваха половину полка обучил стрельбе! У него талант инструктора, дарованный Богом-Императором".
"Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"
languages.original_text: "Йоваха половину полка обучил стрельбе! У него талант инструктора, дарованный Богом-Императором".

traits.locale_text: "Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"
"Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"
"Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"

languages.text: 「ジョヴァハは連隊の半分に銃の扱い方を教えた！彼は指導者としての才能を皇帝から授かった！」
languages.original_text: "Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"

traits.locale_text: ジョヴァハは連隊の半分に銃の扱い方を教えた！彼は指導者としての才能を皇帝から授かった！

languages.text: « La moitié de nos soldats ont appris à manier leurs armes grâce à Jovakha ! L'Empereur-Dieu lui a fait don d'un talent d'instructeur inouï ! »
languages.original_text: "Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"

traits.locale_text: « La moitié de nos soldats ont appris à manier leurs armes grâce à Jovakha ! L'Empereur-Dieu lui a fait don d'un talent d'instructeur inouï ! »

languages.text: "Jovakha, alayın yarısına ateş etmeyi öğretti! Tanrı İmparator vergisi bir eğitmenlik yeteneği var!"
languages.original_text: "Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"

traits.locale_text: "Jovakha, alayın yarısına ateş etmeyi öğretti! Tanrı İmparator vergisi bir eğitmenlik yeteneği var!"

languages.text: "Jovakha hat dem halben Regiment das Schießen beigebracht! Er hat ein vom Gottimperator gegebenes Talent als Ausbilder!"
languages.original_text: "Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"

traits.locale_text: "Jovakha hat dem halben Regiment das Schießen beigebracht! Er hat ein vom Gottimperator gegebenes Talent als Ausbilder!"

languages.text: «Jovakha enseñó a disparar a la mitad del regimiento! ¡El Dios Emperador le ha concedido talento como instructor!».
languages.original_text: "Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"

traits.locale_text: «Jovakha enseñó a disparar a la mitad del regimiento! ¡El Dios Emperador le ha concedido talento como instructor!».

languages.text: “军团里半数的人都是约瓦哈教出来的！他拥有神皇赐予的教官天赋！”
languages.original_text: "Jovakha taught half the regiment how to shoot! He's got God-Emperor-given talent as an instructor!"

traits.locale_text: “军团里半数的人都是约瓦哈教出来的！他拥有神皇赐予的教官天赋！”
